headline: Carriers Expand Telematics Use, Integrate Device Capabilities and Accessibility Elements to Enhance Mobile Experience
summary: Keynova Group, the principal competitive intelligence source for digital financial services firms, today announced the results of the Q1 2026 edition of its semi-annual Mobile Insurance Scorecard. The competitive report benchmarks the mobile apps and mobile websites of the 12 largest U.S. auto and property insurance carriers, naming Progressive and GEICO as co-leaders in Overall Score for the mobile user experience. Allstate ties GEICO for the top mobile app, while Progressive once again ranks h
